items.title: Stock Market LIVE Updates: GIFT Nifty hints at flat start amid mixed cues; Nikkei 225 hits 58k
items.description: Sensex Today | Stock Market LIVE: GIFT Nifty was trading at 25,998 levels, up by 25.50 points, indicating a flat start for benchmark indices

items.title: Fractal Analytics IPO allotment today; check status, GMP, listing date
items.description: Investors can check their Fractal Analytics IPO allotment status on the official NSE and BSE websites, as well as on the registrar's portal, MUFG Intime India

items.title: Bonfiglioli Transmissions files DRHP for IPO; promoter to reduce stake
items.description: Bonfiglioli Transmissions IPO comprises an offer for sale (OFS) of up to 46.99 million shares by promoter Bonfiglioli SpA
